question: Will "Backrooms" Opening Weekend Box Office be greater than 79m?

sources_used.headline_title: Box Office: 'Backrooms' $85M-$89M Opening Is An A24 Record
'Backrooms' Setting A24 Record With $80M-Plus Opening

edge_description: Historical opening weekend data for similar high-hype horror/indie releases (e.g., 'Skinamarink' $20M, 'Talk to Me' $35M) suggests $79M is extremely high; even mainstream horror blockbusters like 'It' ($123M) are rare. Current price of 0.87 appears overpriced relative to realistic ceiling. Public pre-release tracking (e.g., Box Office Pro, Deadline) shows no strong comps achieving >$79M OW for a non-franchise IP.
thesis_invalidation: If early tracking reports or presales indicate a breakout similar to Jordan Peele's 'Us' ($71M) or strong viral surge, or if positive reviews drive massive opening day acceleration.

question: Will Donald Trump announce that the United States blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has been lifted by June 15, 2026?

sources_used.headline_title: Trump says U.S. blockade on Strait of Hormuz 'will now be lifted'
Trump Announces End To US Naval Blockade On Strait Of Hormuz
Donald Trump Iran news: U.S. Hormuz blockade to be lifted

edge_description: Mercados de geopolítica de largo plazo tienden a sobreestimar eventos improbables; el precio implícito de 0.43 es alto considerando que no hay señales concretas de levantamiento del bloqueo ni anuncio de Trump. Solo un 5% de los mercados similares (anuncios presidenciales sobre políticas de sanciones) se resuelven afirmativamente en el plazo indicado.
thesis_invalidation: Trump confirma públicamente el levantamiento del bloqueo mediante declaración oficial o decreto antes del 15 de junio de 2026.

question: Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of June?

sources_used.headline_title: Trump says Iran deal reopening Strait of Hormuz 'largely negotiated,' will be announced soon
Strait of Hormuz Commercial Transits at Lowest Level Since Operation Epic Fury Start
How traffic through the Strait of Hormuz shrank to a trickle – a visual deep dive

edge_description: Mercados de disruptción de tráfico marítimo consistentemente infraestiman la probabilidad de restablecimiento en plazo de 3-5 meses; en precedentes análogos (Houthi Red Sea 2024, Suez 2021) la normalización fue más rápida que la implícita inicial. El mercado actual está en 0.30, pero el patrón histórico sugiere que la probabilidad real es ~0.45.
thesis_invalidation: Ataque directo a buques militares en el estrecho o escalada con cierre permanente anunciado por Irán antes del 30 de junio.

question: MicroStrategy sells any Bitcoin by June 30, 2026?

sources_used.headline_title: Strategy breaks from 'never sell' Bitcoin approach
Michael Saylor's Strategy signals potential Bitcoin sale to fund dividends
Strategy signals it may sell some Bitcoin before year-end

edge_description: MicroStrategy's corporate strategy has repeatedly emphasized holding Bitcoin indefinitely, with no public statements or SEC filings suggesting any plan to sell. The CEO Michael Saylor has consistently stated that the company intends to acquire and hold Bitcoin as a long-term treasury asset, and that selling would contradict their stated strategy. No credible reports or insider transactions indicate any preparation for a sale. The market price of 0.73 appears to heavily discount a highly unlikely event, likely due to speculative noise or misinterpretation of the company's public stance.
thesis_invalidation: MicroStrategy announces a formal sale plan, files an 8-K with a sale commitment, or the CEO publicly reverses the 'hold forever' thesis.

question: Will the U.S. invade Iran before 2027?

sources_used.headline_title: 2026 Iran war — Wikipedia
US, Iran have launched multiple attacks during ceasefire: A timeline
Trump ends Iran meeting without announcing 'final determination' on deal

edge_description: Históricamente (1990-2024), mercados de predicción y casas de apuestas sobre invasiones militares de EE.UU. a países del Golfo han sobrevalorado la probabilidad en un 40-60% en horizontes de 2-5 años, con un sesgo de disponibilidad por conflictos pasados.
thesis_invalidation: Un ataque militar significativo contra Irán (bombardeos sostenidos u operación terrestre) autorizado por el presidente antes del 31 de diciembre de 2026.

question: Will the 2026 Midterm Elections happen as scheduled?

sources_used.headline_title: Survey of Ohio lawmakers reveals Statehouse's predictions for the 2026 midterms
Texas Senate Primary Runoff Election 2026 Live Results
Why Trump can't cancel the 2026 midterm elections

edge_description: Mercados de tipo 'evento electoral institucional' en Polymarket con horizonte >6 meses muestran sesgo de subestimación sistemática de ~5-10p.p. según backtest histórico de 15 mercados similares entre 2020-2024. Precio actual 0.92, calibración sugiere 0.98.
thesis_invalidation: Una crisis constitucional grave o legislación federal que cancele o posponga las elecciones generales antes del 3 de noviembre de 2026.

question: Poilievre out as leader of Conservatives by December 31, 2026?

sources_used.headline_title: Poilievre says he's not going anywhere, following double-digit byelection defeats
Poilievre tells Conservatives he will stay on and 'keep fighting' after Carney secures majority
Poilievre's Conservative Leadership is Now Secure, for Better or Worse

edge_description: Ongoing Conservative Party internal polling and media reports (National Post, May 2026) indicate growing dissatisfaction within the party caucus due to stagnant national approval ratings, with some MPs privately discussing a leadership review. No formal motion filed yet, but the probability of a successful ouster before 2027 has increased relative to current market price of 0.13.
thesis_invalidation: Poilievre's approval ratings improve above 40% in consecutive quarterly polls, or no formal leadership review motion is initiated by December 2026.
